name: limena
description: limena's official plugin catalog — accessibility audits, WCAG fix stories, and program management for Claude.

plugins.name: limena-audit
plugins.description: Drive limena's hosted accessibility audit platform from Claude. Conversational flow walks 'which client → which program → which URLs', queues audits, polls until ready, summarises findings, and generates fix stories. Pairs axe-core with an LLM heuristic engine for ~96% WCAG 2.2 AA coverage. Use for accessibility audits, WCAG compliance, AODA / ADA / Section 508 / EN 301 549 reporting.
